trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.

trait.description_more: Result of "Haemoglobin Concentration" assay, performed on blood sample, obtained from UK Biobank assessment centre visit.   Analyser operating range was 0 to 99.9g/dL   Typical reference range is 12.1 to 16.3g/dL
